form.formComment: Resumes after a break of 11 weeks and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign fifth of 13 at this track January 21 over 3100m, soft track; 8 len behind Vampire Slayer carrying 61.5kg at $7. Previously first up; third of 10 at Doncaster November 28 over 3300m, 14 len behind Postponed Legacy with 65kg at $10. Expected to run well.

previousStarts.trainer: SOC AL CLODIA DI M CANU

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of five months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation failed to finish at Wetherby October 31 over 4300m. When resuming last campaign third of 11 at Newcastle February 22 2025 over 3390m, 7 len behind The Best Way carrying 75.5kg at $9. Finds a suitable assignment here and can kick things off in a bright way.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 10th of 12 at Southwell All Weather on March 10 over 1600m, 9 len behind Camino Del Ray with 61kg at $41. Last start 6th of 14 at Doncaster on March 28 over 2000m, 4.5 len behind Dancing Tiger carrying 61kg at $51. Faces a stiff assignment.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of five months. Finished off last campaign sixth of 8 at Musselburgh November 5 over 2500m, soft track; 11 len behind Velvet Whisper carrying 61kg at $13. Previously first up; second of 10 at Thirsk April 22 over 2400m, a neck behind Perfectly Timed with 56kg at $5.50. Looks tested.

form.formComment: Comes off a 52 day let-up. At the latest run won by 1.3 len at Newcastle All Weather February 15 over 2500m defeating Angelardo carrying 60.5kg at $5.50. The race before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 8 at Newcastle All Weather on January 13 over 3300m, 22 len behind Tarbat Ness carrying 59.5kg at $6.50. Stick with him.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of five months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation when last of 9 at Musselburgh November 5 over 3200m, soft track; 128 len behind Quercus Robur carrying 62.5kg at $8.50. Previously first up; ran last in a small field at Newcastle All Weather May 2 over 3260m, 4 len behind Billy Bathgate carrying 62.5kg at $9.50. Must be included.

form.formComment: Comes off a 34 day let-up. Last start 7th of 9 at Newcastle All Weather on March 5 over 1600m, 6 len behind Woodrafff with 61kg at $9. form.formComment: Last start second last of 10 at Newcastle All Weather on March 11 over 3300m, 14 len behind Angelardo carrying 56kg at $29. The race before that 6th of 10 at Wolverhampton on February 17 over 2800m, 4 len behind Knight Of Magic with 54.5kg at $23. Not going well enough. Doubt he will be troubling these.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months second last of 10 at Newcastle All Weather on March 19 over 2000m, 9 len behind Mao Shang Wong with 52.5kg at $41. Previously second-up eased back early on 6th of 8 at Beverley on July 21 over 1500m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Woodrafff with 60kg at $12. Not keen.
